title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD's Methodology - Initial Results
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: The Clorox Company: High Valuations And Near-Term Headwinds Keep Me On The Sidelines
text: The company should continue to get adversely impacted by current macro headwinds in the near term. Easing supply chain challenges, and the company's long-term growth strategy should help in delivering revenue growth beyond the fiscal year 2023.

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For January 2023
text: NOBL gained 7.12% in November, which brings the Fund's return for the year to a loss of 2.14%. Thus far this month, through December 23rd, the dividend aristocrat ETF is down 3.47%, bringing its year-to-date return to -5.86%.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Sell Before They Dive in 2023

title: Pandemic Winners, Inflation Losers - Finally Time To Buy Clorox And Church & Dwight?
text: Clorox and Church & Dwight are undeniable winners from the pandemic. However, CLX and CHD are currently struggling with input cost inflation and other headwinds. In this article, I will take an in-depth look at the fundamentals of both companies. I explain which company is better managed and is the better long-term investment.

title: Here's Why You Should Hold on to Clorox (CLX) Stock Now

title: 7 Growth Stocks to Sell Before They Wither in 2023

title: 5 Soaps & Cleaning Materials Stocks Showing Potential Amid Hardships
text: The soap and cleaning materials industry battles headwinds from elevated logistics, input and manufacturing costs. Innovation, digital growth and brand building are likely to drive players like PG, RBGLY, HENKY, CHD and CLX.
